title: Top 10 Free Dental Care Options For Seniors
article:
1. Why Oral Health Is Important For Seniors' Overall Wellness?

Having a healthy mouth is crucial for good physical health. Experts say it is hard to be in top shape if your oral health is lacking. Your mouth is like a gate to wellness. Moreover, new studies have shown a strong link between oral health and overall physical health.

title: Top 10 Free Dental Care Options For Seniors
article:
2. How To Maintain Your Oral Health As Seniors?

As you age, it's important to take care of your teeth to avoid diseases. Many seniors have trouble getting affordable dental care because Medicare doesn't cover it and Medicaid only covers a little. But don't worry! Here are 10 affordable dental care options for your oral health.

title: Top 10 Free Dental Care Options For Seniors
article:
3. Listing The First Five Options

When it comes to finding dental care options for seniors, there are a variety of resources available to help navigate the process, such as:

- toothwisdom.org

- Eldercare Locator

- 2-1-1 Information and Referral Search

- PACE (Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly)

- The Health Resources and Services Administration (HRSA)

title: Top 10 Free Dental Care Options For Seniors
article:
4. Another Five Preferable Options

There are also some additional options available to aid in maintaining your dental health, which are:

- The Dental Life Network (formerly the National Foundation of Dentistry for the Handicapped)

- non-profit Dentistry From The Heart (DFTH)

- United Way

- Dental schools

- The National Association of Free and Charitable Clinics
